notes:
RetinaTag 1.5.72 — Windows startup-freeze fix

Fixed:
- Large-library launch freeze: backend DB commands now run on Tauri's blocking pool via spawn_blocking, freeing the async-runtime worker pool for IPC dispatch. UI clicks register immediately on launch even on 60K+ photo libraries.
- Frontend init: photo grid loads first, sidebar widgets fire sequentially in the background instead of saturating the worker pool with parallel DB queries.

From v1.5.71:
- Search overhaul (stop-word filtering, per-concept AND logic, Turkish vehicle disambiguation)
- Trending Tags panel removed

From v1.5.62..v1.5.70:
- Vault private photos (AES-256, BIP39 recovery, Windows Hello)
- Auto-updater
- Lightbox UI polish
- Modal overflow fixes

Windows: x86_64 NSIS installer.
macOS: Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3+).
